Hawaii 3-Day Eco-Adventure 🌴
• **Green Choice**: 451 kg CO₂ | $990 | 150 pts
  - Flight: HA51 (3000 km, 50% SAF) **385 kg CO₂**
  - Stay: EcoNest Retreat **36 kg CO₂**
  - Transit: Tesla Model 3 **0 kg CO₂**
• **Balanced Choice**: 664 kg CO₂ | $876 | 105 pts
  - Flight: UA362 (3000 km, 30% SAF) **573 kg CO₂**
  - Stay: Green Haven Lodge **75 kg CO₂**
  - Transit: Toyota Prius **16 kg CO₂**
• **Standard Choice**: 1,031 kg CO₂ | $840
  - Flight: DL329 **855 kg CO₂**
  - Stay: Grand Plaza Resort **135 kg CO₂**
  - Transit: Gas SUV **41 kg CO₂**

Opting for the greenest package saves **56%** emissions compared to standard, for an additional **$150**.

flight.details: Medium-Haul flight (3000.0 km) on Airbus A330-200 with Hawaiian Airlines (SAF Eco-Flyer). Utilizes 50% Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) blend, reducing carbon footprint by 55%.

stay.details: LEED Gold certified property in travel to hawaii. Located at 2259 Kalakaua Ave, Honolulu, HI 96815 (Rating: 4.8 stars). Runs on 100% solar power, practices strict zero-waste dining, and uses greywater systems.

transit.details: All-electric Tesla Model 3 for 144.0 km (Includes airport transfer: Includes HNL Airport to Waikiki Hotel transfer via Route 19 Bus (12 km each way)). Powered entirely by the local solar charging network (0 tailpipe emissions).

green_choice.summary: Greenest option: Flight (385 kg CO₂), Stay (36 kg CO₂), Transit (0 kg CO₂). Total: 451 kg CO₂.

flight.details: Medium-Haul flight (3000.0 km) on Boeing 767-400ER with United Airlines (Hybrid Blend). Uses a 30% Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) blend, reducing carbon footprint by 33%.

stay.details: Boutique lodging in travel to hawaii. Featuring basic eco-efficiency practices, LED lighting systems, and water-conserving plumbing fixtures. Located at 120 Kaiulani Ave, Honolulu, HI 96815 (Rating: 4.3 stars).

transit.details: Standard Toyota Prius hybrid vehicle for 144.0 km (Includes airport transfer: Includes HNL Airport to Waikiki Hotel transfer via Route 19 Bus (12 km each way)) (109 g CO2e/km factor).

balanced_choice.summary: Balanced option: Flight (573 kg CO₂), Stay (75 kg CO₂), Transit (16 kg CO₂). Total: 664 kg CO₂.

flight.details: Medium-Haul flight (3000.0 km) on Boeing 767-300ER with Delta Air Lines. Standard direct economy flight using conventional kerosene jet fuel.
